headlines.title: Trump seeks payback against Republicans who opposed him in today's primaries
headlines.description: President Donald Trump's revenge tour against dissident Republicans hits Indiana's primaries on Tuesday, as he and allies try to unseat seven Republican state senators who voted last year against a Trump-backed congressional map

headlines.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer dollars to secure Trump ballroom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump portrayed the big new ballroom he’s building on White House grounds as a gift to the nation, courtesy of patriotic private donors.

headlines.title: Howard Lutnick faces congressional showdown after Epstein files revealed island visit
headlines.description: Howard Lutnick said he stopped talking to Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But a House inquiry wants to know why investigatory files show otherwise.

headlines.title: U.S. insists Iran ceasefire not over despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The ceasefire in the Middle East was in peril Tuesday after the United States and Iran traded fire and threats over President Donald Trump's new mission to force open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Alleged WHCD shooter indicted on four counts by federal grand jury
headlines.description: The suspect who allegedly tried to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner is facing a fourth charge from a federal grand jury. The new charge Cole Tomas Allen faces is assault on a federal officer with a deadly weapon.

headlines.title: Makers of mifepristone challenge ruling restricting access to drug
headlines.description: A maker of the abortion pill mifepristone asked the Supreme Court to block a court ruling that cut off mail-order access to the drug. The ruling was the result of a legal challenge from the state of Louisiana, which had sued the Food and Drug Administration over a 2023 policy change that removed the requirement for patients to see a health care provider in person to get mifepristone.

headlines.title: Lebanon ceasefire is a ‘complete joke’ as millions face food insecurity: World Central Kitchen chef
headlines.description: World Central Kitchen Chef Aline Kamakian joins Meet the Press NOW from Beirut to discuss the deepening hunger crisis in Lebanon as people continue to be forced from their homes due to the ongoing conflict between Israel and Hezbollah.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: U.S. commercial ships had military security aboard during Hormuz transit, sources say
headlines.description: Two U.S. commercial ships that crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Monday had U.S. military security teams aboard as Iran launched attacks against them during the transit, according to two U.S. officials.

headlines.title: 7 Indiana legislators face Trump-backed primary challengers after bucking him on redistricting
headlines.description: Trump's intervention after losing redistricting battle has shined a national spotlight on what are usually quiet Republican primaries for Indiana state Senate seats.
